parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($json.body && $json.body.needs_pdf_extract && $json.body.pdf_b64 ? { model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 4000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'document', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: 'application/pdf', data: $json.body.pdf_b64 } }, { type: 'text', text: 'Extract and return the complete text content of this document verbatim. Return only the text, no commentary.' }] }] } : { model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 5, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Say: SKIP' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a Shipley-certified PINK TEAM reviewer. The Pink Team reviews proposal storyboards, structure, and compliance BEFORE full text is drafted. Per Shipley methodology (shipleywins.com/blogs/color-team-reviews), Pink Team verifies: (1) RFP compliance — every shall/must/will statement mapped, (2) win strategy execution — are win themes present in every section, (3) proposal structure — does the outline match Section L/M instructions, (4) solution approach — is the technical solution responsive to requirements, (5) graphics/table plan — are visuals planned for key discriminators. Reference: FAR 15.305 evaluation factors, DFARS 215.305, Section L/M of the RFP. Reference: Shipley Proposal Guide Chapter 8 (Color Team Reviews). Reference: https://www.shipleywins.com/blogs/color-team-reviews. Return ONLY raw JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'PINK TEAM REVIEW — COMPLIANCE & STRUCTURE
Agency: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.agency + '
Title: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_title + '
Solicitation: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.solicitation_number || 'N/A') + '
NAICS: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.naics || 'N/A') + '
Set-Aside: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.set_aside || 'N/A') + '

=== GOVERNMENT DOCUMENTS (RFP/SOW) ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_text || '').substring(0, 15000) + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.has_proposal ? '

=== OUR PROPOSAL RESPONSE ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.proposal_text || '').substring(0, 10000) : '') + '

CONDUCT A THOROUGH PINK TEAM REVIEW. Return JSON: {"compliance_matrix": [{"requirement": "string", "rfp_reference": "section/para", "response_status": "Addressed|Partial|Missing|Not Applicable", "notes": "string"}], "section_l_compliance": [{"instruction": "string", "compliant": true, "gap": "string"}], "win_themes_assessment": [{"theme": "string", "present_in_sections": ["string"], "strength": "Strong|Adequate|Weak|Missing"}], "structural_issues": ["string"], "missing_sections": ["string"], "graphics_needed": ["string"], "compliance_score": 0, "pink_team_rating": "GREEN|YELLOW|RED", "recommendations": ["string"]}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a Shipley-certified RED TEAM reviewer simulating the government Source Selection Evaluation Board (SSEB). The Red Team predicts how the customer will score the proposal and recommends improvements. Per Shipley methodology, Red Team evaluates: (1) customer focus — does the proposal speak to what the evaluator cares about, (2) completeness — are all requirements addressed with specificity, (3) clear communication — is the solution easy to understand and score, (4) win strategy — are discriminators obvious and compelling, (5) scoring prediction — simulate government adjectival ratings (Outstanding/Good/Acceptable/Marginal/Unacceptable per FAR 15.305). Reference: FAR 15.305 proposal evaluation, FAR 15.308 source selection decision. Reference: DoD Source Selection Procedures (2022). Reference: https://www.shipleywins.com/blogs/color-team-reviews. Reference: https://info.ksiadvantage.com/blog/articles/gold-at-the-end-of-the-rainbow-proposal-color-reviews-ratings. Return ONLY raw JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'RED TEAM REVIEW — EVALUATOR SIMULATION
Agency: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.agency + '
Title: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_title + '
Value: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.value || 'Not specified') + '

=== GOVERNMENT DOCUMENTS ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_text || '').substring(0, 12000) + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.has_proposal ? '

=== OUR PROPOSAL RESPONSE ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.proposal_text || '').substring(0, 10000) : '') + '

SIMULATE THE GOVERNMENT EVALUATION. Score each factor. Return JSON: {"evaluation_factors": [{"factor": "string", "weight": "string", "predicted_rating": "Outstanding|Good|Acceptable|Marginal|Unacceptable", "strengths": ["string"], "weaknesses": ["string"], "deficiencies": ["string"], "improvement_actions": ["string"]}], "overall_rating": "Outstanding|Good|Acceptable|Marginal|Unacceptable", "win_probability": "X%", "win_probability_rationale": "string", "go_no_go": "GO|HOLD|NO-GO", "go_confidence": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW", "discriminators": ["string"], "competitive_landscape": "string", "pricing_insights": "string", "red_team_rating": "GREEN|YELLOW|RED", "critical_fixes_before_submit": ["string"], "recommendations": ["string"]}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 3000, system: 'You are a Shipley-certified GOLD TEAM reviewer — senior executive conducting the final pre-submission review. The Gold Team confirms all changes from Pink and Red Teams have been incorporated and the proposal is positioned to win. Per Shipley methodology, Gold Team focuses on: (1) executive-level win themes and discriminators, (2) price-to-win positioning, (3) risk assessment — does the proposal create unacceptable risk for the government, (4) overall narrative coherence, (5) final go/no-go recommendation to company leadership. Reference: Shipley Proposal Guide. Reference: https://www.utleystrategies.com/blog/pink-red-gold-team-review. Reference: https://info.ksiadvantage.com/blog/articles/gold-at-the-end-of-the-rainbow-proposal-color-reviews-ratings. Return ONLY raw JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'GOLD TEAM REVIEW — EXECUTIVE FINAL REVIEW
Agency: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.agency + '
Title: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_title + '
NAICS: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.naics || 'N/A') + '
Set-Aside: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.set_aside || 'N/A') + '

=== RFP/SOW ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_text || '').substring(0, 10000) + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.has_proposal ? '

=== OUR RESPONSE ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.proposal_text || '').substring(0, 8000) : '') + '

CONDUCT GOLD TEAM EXECUTIVE REVIEW. Return JSON: {"executive_summary": "string", "win_themes_validated": [{"theme": "string", "status": "Strong|Needs Work|Missing", "recommendation": "string"}], "discriminators_assessment": [{"discriminator": "string", "compelling": true, "improvement": "string"}], "risk_to_government": [{"risk": "string", "severity": "High|Medium|Low", "mitigation_in_proposal": "string"}], "price_competitiveness": "string", "narrative_coherence": "string", "submission_readiness": "Ready|Needs Revision|Not Ready", "gold_team_rating": "GREEN|YELLOW|RED", "executive_recommendations": ["string"], "final_go_no_go": "GO|HOLD|NO-GO"}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 3000, system: 'You are a Shipley BLACK HAT review specialist analyzing the competitive landscape. Black Hat reviews predict what competitors will propose and develop ghost themes to neutralize their strengths. Per Shipley methodology: (1) identify likely competitors by analyzing incumbent data, agency relationships, and contract history, (2) predict each competitor strategy and solution approach, (3) develop ghost themes — subtle proposal language that highlights our strengths in areas where competitors are weak WITHOUT naming them, (4) identify teaming opportunities to fill capability gaps. Reference: Shipley Capture Guide Chapter 5 (Competitive Assessment). Reference: GovTribe for competitor award history. Reference: USASpending.gov for incumbent spending data. Return ONLY raw JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'BLACK HAT COMPETITIVE ANALYSIS
Agency: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.agency + '
Title: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_title + '
Set-Aside: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.set_aside || 'N/A') + '
NAICS: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.naics || 'N/A') + '
Value: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.value || 'Not specified') + '

=== RFP/SOW ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_text || '').substring(0, 10000) + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.has_proposal ? '

=== OUR RESPONSE ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.proposal_text || '').substring(0, 6000) : '') + '

CONDUCT BLACK HAT ANALYSIS. Return JSON: {"likely_competitors": [{"name": "string", "threat_level": "CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW", "likely_strategy": "string", "strengths_vs_us": ["string"], "weaknesses_vs_us": ["string"], "incumbent_advantage": true, "estimated_pwin": "X%"}], "ghost_themes": [{"theme": "string", "target_competitor": "string", "proposal_language": "string", "where_to_insert": "string"}], "competitive_positioning": "string", "counter_strategies": ["string"], "teaming_recommendations": [{"partner_type": "string", "capability_filled": "string", "rationale": "string"}], "win_strategy_adjustments": ["string"]}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 3000, system: 'You are a Shipley BLUE TEAM / WHITE GLOVE reviewer conducting final compliance and production review. The Blue Team ensures: (1) every shall/must/will from the RFP is traced to a specific proposal response, (2) page counts match Section L instructions, (3) formatting matches RFP requirements (font, margins, headers), (4) all acronyms defined on first use, (5) cross-references are accurate, (6) all CDRLs/deliverables addressed, (7) certifications and representations complete, (8) no conflicting statements between volumes. Reference: FAR 52.215-1 Instructions to Offerors. Reference: DFARS 252.215-7007. Return ONLY raw JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'BLUE TEAM — FINAL COMPLIANCE & PRODUCTION CHECK
Agency: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.agency + '
Title: ' + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_title + '
Solicitation: ' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.solicitation_number || 'N/A') + '

=== RFP/SOW ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_text || '').substring(0, 12000) + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.has_proposal ? '

=== OUR RESPONSE ===
' + ($('Validate RFP Input').first().json.proposal_text || '').substring(0, 10000) : '') + '

CONDUCT BLUE TEAM COMPLIANCE CHECK. Return JSON: {"shall_must_will_trace": [{"requirement_text": "string", "rfp_ref": "string", "proposal_ref": "string or MISSING", "status": "Traced|Partial|Missing"}], "formatting_issues": ["string"], "page_count_assessment": "string", "acronym_issues": ["string"], "cross_reference_errors": ["string"], "deliverables_checklist": [{"deliverable": "string", "addressed": true, "notes": "string"}], "certifications_complete": true, "conflicting_statements": ["string"], "production_readiness": "Ready|Minor Issues|Major Issues", "blue_team_rating": "GREEN|YELLOW|RED", "critical_fixes": ["string"]}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a senior GovCon proposal writer. Using the complete Shipley color team analysis results, draft an improved proposal response that addresses every finding. Write in professional government proposal language. Include specific compliance language for each gap identified.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Draft improved proposal based on color team findings:

RFP: ' + $json.rfp_title + ' (' + $json.agency + ')
Go/No-Go: ' + $json.go_no_go + '
Win Probability: ' + $json.win_probability + '
Overall Rating: ' + $json.overall_rating + '

PINK TEAM FINDINGS (Compliance):
' + ($json.pink_team.missing_sections || []).map(function(s){return '- MISSING: '+s;}).join('
') + '

RED TEAM CRITICAL FIXES:
' + ($json.red_team.critical_fixes || []).map(function(f){return '- '+f;}).join('
') + '

GOLD TEAM EXECUTIVE FEEDBACK:
' + ($json.gold_team.executive_recommendations || []).join('
') + '

BLACK HAT GHOST THEMES TO INCORPORATE:
' + ($json.black_hat.ghost_themes || []).map(function(g){return '- '+g.theme+': '+g.proposal_language;}).join('
') + '

BLUE TEAM COMPLIANCE GAPS:
' + ($json.blue_team.shall_must_will_trace || []).filter(function(t){return t.status=="Missing";}).map(function(t){return '- '+t.requirement_text;}).join('
') + '

Write the improved draft addressing ALL findings.' }] }) }}
